text:
Real Escape Game x Hunter × Hunter (リアル脱出ゲーム x Hunter × Hunter, Riaru Dasshutsu Gēmu x Hantā Hantā) is a series of real escape games created by SCRAP in collaboration with Hunter × Hunter.

Information

Real Escape Game by SCRAP has had several collaborations with the Hunter × Hunter franchise, creating large-scale interactive events where participants must solve puzzles to escape within a time limit. In one collaboration, an online escape game was created. Most of the collaboration site pages have online activities or mini-games.

Collaborations

Escape from the Hunter Exam

Escape from the Hunter Exam (ハンター試験からの脱出, Hantā Shiken kara no Dasshutsu) is the first collaboration escape game.

Escape from G.I. Amusement Park

Escape from G.I. Amusement Park (グリードアイランド遊園地からの脱出, Gurīdo Airando Yūenchi kara no Dasshutsu) is the second collaboration escape game.
On the second collaboration's site, there is a Nen type quiz. There are two questions total, but the questions may change upon each attempt. At the end of the quiz, you are asked to infuse your Nen to reveal your type. The following are the three possible questions:
Are you the type of person that wholeheartedly works hard?
Are you the argumentative type?
Are you the sensitive type?

Online Escape from Trick Dungeon

Online Escape from Trick Dungeon (変幻自在の迷宮（トリックダンジョン）からの脱出, Torikku Danjon kara no Dasshutsu) is the third collaboration escape game. 

Escape from the Hunter Exam in a Stadium

Escape from the Hunter Exam in a Stadium (ハンター試験スタジアムからの脱出, Hantā Shiken Sutajiamu kara no Dasshutsu) is the fourth collaboration escape game.

Escape from the Hunter Exam Amidst a Chimera Ant Invasion

Escape From Hunter Exam Amidst a Chimera Ant Invasion (キメラアント襲来するハンター試験からの脱出, Kimerānto Shūrai suru Hantā Shiken kara no Dasshutsu) is the fifth collaboration escape game. It will be held at the Makuhari Messe convention center, in Tokyo.
